header_title.description: Oshityo shOmadhano shokumwenyo mOmusheno. Eapp yo ndjoka yomadhano gOmadhano gOmadhano gOshilongo.

header_subtitle.description: Oshityo shOhambo shokumwenyo po oshowo shOmadhano shilongo.

home_page_hero_title.description: Oshityo shOmadhano shOshoka mOmusheno gOhome page.

home_page_hero_subtitle.text: Loka omadhano goholoka gOshikuku shOmadhano gOmadhano
home_page_hero_subtitle.description: Oshityo shOhambo shOshoka mOmusheno gOhome page po oshowo shOmadhano.

recipe_card_cooking_time.description: Oshityo shOhambo shokupika mEpi gOmadhano gOshilongo. {minutes} oya shoka okwa li mEpi.

recipe_card_difficulty.description: Oshityo shOhambo shOshowo po oshowo oshilongo shOmadhano gOshilongo.

recipe_card_easy.description: Oshityo shOhambo shOshowo oshilongo sho ndjoka yOmuya.

recipe_card_medium.description: Oshityo shOhambo shOshowo oshilongo sho ndjoka yOmbi.

recipe_card_hard.description: Oshityo shOhambo shOshowo oshilongo sho ndjoka yOkutumba.

recipe_card_ramen_description.text: Omukalo gwOmadhano gOmapuku gOshilongo gOshilongo na chashu yomahumbata, ombinga yOmapeto, na ongele yOmadhano gOmwene.

recipe_card_margherita_name.description: Oshindjila shOmakwawo shO Pizza ya Margherita.

recipe_card_margherita_description.text: Pizza ya Neapolitan e ta li na San Marzano tomatoes, mozzarella yOmwene, na basil.
recipe_card_margherita_description.description: Okutaholoka kOmakwawo gO Pizza ya Margherita.

recipe_card_tacos_name.description: Oshindjila shOmakwawo shO Tacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_tacos_description.text: Tacos dzOmapuku dzOshilongo dzO shoka na pineapple, cilantro, na onion pa corn tortillas.
recipe_card_tacos_description.description: Okutaholoka kOmakwawo gO Tacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.text: Omadhano gOmapuku gOshilongo gOli na sauce ya tomato na butter gOli na omakandjo gO makandjo.

recipe_card_pad_thai_description.text: Ongele yOmadhano gOshilongo gOli na shrimp, tofu, peanuts, na sauce ya tamarind.

recipe_card_crepes_description.text: Crepes dzOshilongo, dzOli na Nutella, strawberries yOmwene, na whipped cream.
